title: Module 1
content:
Small Signal Analysis of BJT: CE Configuration Using Small Signal Hybrid-
Pi Model For Mid Frequency And Low Frequency. (Gain, Input And Output
Impedance). High Frequency Equivalent Circuits Of BJT, Miller Effect,
Analysis Of High Frequency Response Of CE Amplifier.

title: Module 2
content:
Wave Shaping Circuits: Clippers And Clampers
Multivibrators:Types of multivibrators- Monostable, Bistable and Astable
multivibrators- duty cycle, frequency
Schmidt Trigger Circuit
Oscillators:Barkhausen’s Criterion For Oscillation - Types Of Oscillators -
Phase Shift, Wien Bridge, Hartley, Colpitt‘s And Crystal Oscillators.

title: Module 3
content:
Power Devices: Thyristor Family: UJT, SCR, Triac, Diac- Operation And VI
Chara. Transferred Electron Devices, Hot Electron Devices, Varactor Diode,
Power Diodes, Power Transistors, IGBT and GTO- Operation and VI
Characterstics

title: Module 4
content:
Linear Voltage Regulators: load & line regulation, types of voltage
regulators, , Block diagram of a series voltage regulator, series voltage
regulator (working principle and design for a specific output voltage and
current), Short circuit protection and fold back protection, Output current
boosting using Darlington pair transistor.
